name: dev.astrocal/mcp-server
description: AI-native scheduling: check availability, book meetings, cancel and reschedule via MCP

environmentVariables.name: ASTROCAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Astrocal API key (get one at https://astrocal.dev/dashboard/api-keys)

environmentVariables.name: ASTROCAL_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Custom API base URL (defaults to https://api.astrocal.dev)

environmentVariables.name: ASTROCAL_DEFAULT_EVENT_TYPE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default event type ID when not specified in tool calls
